summary: Ground 0 Wisdom Module testing - all backend APIs pass (9/9). Frontend mostly works with one UX bug: after auth gate registration/login, user stays on G0-3 instead of auto-advancing to G0-4.

ui_bugs.issue: After successful registration/login via auth gate modal, user stays on G0-3 instead of automatically advancing to G0-4. handleAuthSuccessLocal() closes the modal but never calls handleContinue(). User must click 'Continue' again manually.
ui_bugs.fix: In handleAuthSuccessLocal(), after setShowAuthModal(false), call handleContinue() or directly advance lessonIndex to nextIndex and setView('lesson')

action_items: Fix: After auth gate registration/login success, automatically advance to G0-4 instead of staying on G0-3. In handleAuthSuccessLocal(), call handleContinue() or directly: setLessonIndex(lessonIndex + 1); setView('lesson'); setSelectedOption(null);
critical_code_review_comments: handleAuthSuccessLocal in Ground0LessonPlayer.jsx does not advance the lesson after auth - it only closes the modal. The handleContinue() should be called after setLocalUser() is confirmed, or the next lesson index should be set directly.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ground0_* users created via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 lessons accessible, overview shows ACCOUNT REQUIRED badges for G0-4/5/6, auth gate modal has Google+email/password tabs, back button works, decision screen (GO/WAIT/NO-GO) works, completion screens all correct (GO=Request Admission no price, WAIT=Run REACH Diagnostic, NO-GO=Contact LaunchPath). The one bug is auth gate not advancing lesson after login/register. Backend: register, login (coach+user), ground0 progress save/get all working.
rca_of_issue: In handleContinue(), when next lesson requires auth and user is not logged in, the function shows the modal and returns early. After auth success in handleAuthSuccessLocal(), the modal is closed but the original handleContinue() call chain is never resumed. Fix: store a pending 'pendingContinue' flag or call the advance logic directly in handleAuthSuccessLocal().
